entries.source: Treat this as a stateful, evidence-aware historical simulation with a passport, travel advisory, world view, and choices.
entries.value: Ichukulie hii kama uigaji wa kihistoria unaozingatia ushahidi na hali, ukiwa na pasipoti, ushauri wa kusafiri, mtazamo wa ulimwengu, na chaguzi.

entries.source: Treating a popular market as an attractive market.
entries.value: Kuchukulia soko maarufu kama soko la kuvutia.

entries.source: Treating religion as private opinion rather than public order would sound strange and possibly dangerous.
entries.value: Kuchukulia dini kama maoni ya kibinafsi badala ya utaratibu wa umma ingesikika kuwa ya ajabu na labda hatari.

entries.source: Treats revenue growth as value growth.
entries.value: Inachukulia ukuaji wa mapato kama ukuaji wa thamani.

entries.source: Treats style as a substitute for reasoning.
entries.value: Inachukulia mtindo kama mbadala wa hoja.

entries.source: Trial talk travels through civic spaces
entries.value: Mazungumzo ya kesi yanasafiri kupitia nafasi za kiraia

entries.source: Try first: a coffee tax raises sellers' cost. What should you expect before seeing the graph?
entries.value: Jaribu kwanza: kodi ya kahawa huongeza gharama za wauzaji. Unapaswa kutarajia nini kabla ya kuona grafu?

entries.source: Try first: a value logs as undefined right after a fetch call. What is the most useful first check?
entries.value: Jaribu kwanza: thamani inajisajili kama haijafafanuliwa mara tu baada ya wito wa kuchota data (fetch call). Ni ukaguzi gani wa kwanza unaofaa zaidi?

entries.source: Try first: if sales grow 20% but margins shrink and inventory needs jump, what probably happens to free cash flow?
entries.value: Jaribu kwanza: ikiwa mauzo yatakua kwa 20% lakini faida ikapungua na mahitaji ya hesabu ya bidhaa yakapanda, ni nini kinachoweza kutokea kwa mtiririko wa pesa taslimu?

entries.source: Try first: in food delivery, which force is most likely strengthened by customers comparing prices across apps?
entries.value: Jaribu kwanza: katika utoaji wa chakula, ni nguvu gani inayoweza kuimarishwa zaidi na wateja kulinganisha bei kwenye programu?

entries.source: Try first: what is better evidence that you understand a new concept?
entries.value: Jaribu kwanza: ni ushahidi gani bora zaidi unaoonyesha kuwa unaelewa dhana mpya?

entries.source: Try first: which sentence usually needs repair when evidence is present but the paragraph still feels unconvincing?
entries.value: Jaribu kwanza: ni sentensi gani inayohitaji kurekebishwa wakati ushahidi upo lakini aya bado haionekani kushawishi?

entries.source: Try this frame: "When ___ changes, ___ changes because ___."
entries.value: Jaribu fremu hii: "Wakati ___ inabadilika, ___ inabadilika kwa sababu ___."
geuza madai kuwa hoja zilizo wazi

entries.source: Turn material into a deck you actually test yourself on.
entries.value: Geuza nyenzo kuwa staha (deck) ambayo unajijaribu mwenyewe.

entries.source: Turn the weak spot into a quiz, flashcards, or a follow-up chat.
entries.value: Geuza sehemu dhaifu kuwa maswali, flashcards, au gumzo la kufuatilia.

entries.source: Understand basics, solve problems, revise fast...
entries.value: Elewa misingi, tatua matatizo, kagua haraka...

entries.source: Understand photosynthesis, write an essay plan...
entries.value: Elewa usanisinuru, andika mpango wa insha...

entries.source: Understanding means you can predict, explain, and use an idea in a new situation. Reading is only the start.
entries.value: Kuelewa kunamaanisha unaweza kutabiri, kuelezea, na kutumia wazo katika hali mpya. Kusoma ni mwanzo tu.
Takwimu za mahakama zisizotajwa majina ni mchanganyiko

entries.source: Unresolved until the historical setting is specified.
entries.value: Haijashughulikiwa hadi mazingira ya kihistoria yatakapobainishwa.

entries.source: Unverified details must stay visibly uncertain
entries.value: Maelezo ambayo hayajathibitishwa lazima yabaki na kutokuwa na uhakika dhahiri

entries.source: Use only as the last resort.
entries.value: Tumia kama suluhisho la mwisho pekee.

entries.source: Use the dossier to see what incentives, fears, allies, and enemies shape the reply.
entries.value: Tumia faili (dossier) kuona ni motisha, hofu, washirika, na maadui gani wanaounda jibu.

entries.source: Use visible sections: Shared artifact, AI contribution, User move, Inline comments, Decision log, Open questions, Next action.
entries.value: Tumia sehemu zinazoonekana: Kifaa kilichoshirikiwa, Mchango wa AI, Hatua ya mtumiaji, Maoni ya ndani, Kumbukumbu ya maamuzi, Maswali yaliyo wazi, Hatua inayofuata.

entries.source: User's purpose: help them choose sharp opening questions.
entries.value: Lengo la mtumiaji: wasaidie kuchagua maswali ya ufunguzi yenye makali.

entries.source: Value = forecast free cash flows discounted for risk + discounted terminal value.
entries.value: Thamani = mtiririko wa pesa taslimu uliotabiriwa uliopunguzwa kwa hatari + thamani ya mwisho iliyopunguzwa.
Mifumo ya kata ilipanga maisha ya mijini
Waziri mkuu wa wakati wa vita mnamo 1940

entries.source: West Market during the Tang dynasty
entries.value: Soko la Magharibi wakati wa nasaba ya Tang

entries.source: Wet dust, shouted rumors, smoke, prayer calls, and the metallic anxiety of a city under pressure.
entries.value: Vumbi lenye unyevu, uvumi uliopigwa kelele, moshi, miito ya sala, na wasiwasi wa metali wa jiji lililo chini ya shinikizo.

entries.source: What are we trying to build, solve, learn, or improve?
entries.value: Tunajaribu kujenga, kutatua, kujifunza, au kuboresha nini?

entries.source: What do you want to ask, test, learn, or confront?
entries.value: Unataka kuuliza, kujaribu, kujifunza, au kukabiliana na nini?

entries.source: What do you want to understand or be able to do?
entries.value: Unataka kuelewa au kuweza kufanya nini?
Hii ni kwa ajili ya nini?

entries.source: What kind of journey is this?
entries.value: Hii ni aina gani ya safari?
Ni nini hufanya hoja kuwa ya kweli?

entries.source: What they value, defend, miss, or refuse.
What would you like to be quizzed on today?
entries.value: Ungependa kufanyiwa maswali kuhusu nini leo?

entries.source: Where and when do you want to go?
Whether one encounter changes a crowd's direction
entries.value: Ikiwa mkutano mmoja unabadilisha mwelekeo wa umati

entries.source: Who pressures them, supports them, or threatens them.
entries.value: Nani anawashinikiza, anawaunga mkono, au anawatishia.
Kigezo cha chama cha wafumaji wa sufi
Mvutano wa mtaji wa kufanyia kazi
Taratibu za warsha ni marejesho yanayokubalika
Onyesho la awali la nafasi ya kazi

entries.source: Write a 4 sentence paragraph with a claim, evidence, explanation, and consequence.
entries.value: Andika aya ya sentensi 4 yenye madai, ushahidi, ufafanuzi, na matokeo.

entries.source: Write a short answer. The app checks the link, not polish.
entries.value: Andika jibu fupi. Programu huangalia kiungo, si usahihi wa lugha.

entries.source: Write the core link in one sentence before moving on.
entries.value: Andika kiungo kikuu katika sentensi moja kabla ya kuendelea.

entries.source: Write your answer, even if it is rough.
entries.value: Andika jibu lako, hata kama ni mbichi.

entries.source: Yes. Evidence needs interpretation or the argument feels unfinished.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Ushahidi unahitaji tafsiri au hoja itaonekana haijakamilika.

entries.source: Yes. You connected sales, margins, and working capital instead of treating one line as the whole model.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Umeunganisha mauzo, faida, na mtaji wa kufanyia kazi badala ya kuchukulia mstari mmoja kama mfano mzima.

entries.source: You add ideas first so the buddy can build with you.
entries.value: Unaongeza mawazo kwanza ili mwenzako aweze kujenga na wewe.

entries.source: You can recognize the definition when it appears.
You can use it correctly in a new example.
entries.value: Unaweza kuitumia kwa usahihi katika mfano mpya.

entries.source: You gave enough of the causal link to move forward.
entries.value: Umetoa kiungo cha kutosha cha kisababishi ili kusonga mbele.

entries.source: You have a starting map now. Let us rebuild the weak spots.
entries.value: Sasa una ramani ya kuanzia. Hebu tujenge upya sehemu dhaifu.

entries.source: You have evidence for this step. Use Continue to move ahead.
entries.value: Una ushahidi kwa hatua hii. Tumia Endelea ili kusonga mbele.

entries.source: You named a changed input and connected it to the result. That is the move we are training.
entries.value: Umetaja ingizo lililobadilika na kuliunganisha na matokeo. Hiyo ndiyo hatua tunayofanya mazoezi.

entries.source: You read three explanations about it.
Your answer controls the next question.
Your answer needs a clearer because-link: what changed, what it affected, and why.
entries.value: Jibu lako linahitaji kiungo cha 'kwa sababu' kilicho wazi zaidi: nini kilibadilika, kiliathiri nini, na kwa nini.

entries.source: Your buddy works beside you: you contribute ideas, the app organizes them, and both of you checkpoint progress.
entries.value: Rafiki yako anafanya kazi kando yako: unachangia mawazo, programu inayapanga, na nyote wawili mnaangalia maendeleo.

entries.source: Your status controls language, money, access, danger, and what questions sound natural.
entries.value: Hali yako inadhibiti lugha, pesa, ufikiaji, hatari, na maswali yanayosikika kama ya kawaida.

entries.source: Curious about absolutely anything? Ask, explore, and go deeper at your pace. Your buddy makes ideas practical, memorable, and easy to build on. Try: "Explain how the stock market actually works."
entries.value: Una hamu ya kujua chochote kabisa? Uliza, chunguza, na uende ndani zaidi kwa kasi yako. Rafiki yako hufanya mawazo kuwa ya vitendo, ya kukumbukwa, na rahisi kujenga juu yake. Jaribu: "Eleza jinsi soko la hisa linavyofanya kazi kweli."

entries.source: What are you curious about today?
entries.value: Una hamu ya kujua nini leo?

entries.source: Ask any question and learn through clear explanations, examples, follow-up prompts, and patient AI tutoring.
entries.value: Uliza swali lolote na ujifunze kupitia maelezo wazi, mifano, vidokezo vya ufuatiliaji, na mafunzo ya AI ya subira.

entries.source: Curious learners, students, parents, and self-taught builders who want a friendly place to start.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wadadisi, wanafunzi, wazazi, na watu wanaojifunza wenyewe wanaotaka mahali rafiki pa kuanzia.

entries.source: Instead of dropping a long answer, inspir helps you choose a simpler foundation, a deeper route, or a practical example.
entries.value: Badala ya kutoa jibu refu, inspir hukusaidia kuchagua msingi rahisi, njia ya kina zaidi, au mfano wa kivitendo.

entries.source: Leave with a useful next question
A guided reasoning chamber for disciplined questioning
entries.value: Chumba cha mwongozo wa hoja kwa ajili ya uulizaji maswali wenye nidhamu

entries.source: Turn a concept, argument, problem, text, or decision into a focused chain of questions. Your buddy listens to each answer, maps assumptions and gaps, and pushes you toward your own final synthesis. Try: "Help me understand opportunity cost."
entries.value: Badilisha dhana, hoja, tatizo, maandishi, au uamuzi kuwa msururu wa maswali yaliyolenga. Rafiki yako husikiliza kila jibu, huchora ramani ya dhana na mapungufu, na kukusukuma kuelekea muhtasari wako wa mwisho. Jaribu: "Nisaidie kuelewa gharama ya fursa."

entries.source: Answer the active question in your own words
entries.value: Jibu swali linaloendelea kwa maneno yako mwenyewe

entries.source: Learn through focused questions, hints, and reflection instead of passive answer reading.
entries.value: Jifunze kupitia maswali yaliyolenga, vidokezo, na tafakari badala ya kusoma majibu bila kushiriki.

entries.source: Learners who want to think through a topic, test assumptions, and build durable understanding.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wanaotaka kufikiria mada, kupima dhana, na kujenga uelewa wa kudumu.

entries.source: The tutor asks one question at a time, waits for your reasoning, and synthesizes only after you have tried.
entries.value: Mkufunzi huuliza swali moja kwa wakati mmoja, anasubiri hoja zako, na kutoa muhtasari baada tu ya wewe kujaribu.

entries.source: Turn confusion into a clearer model
entries.value: Badilisha mkanganyiko kuwa mfano ulio wazi zaidi
Ni nini hufanya hoja kuwa halali?

entries.source: Should a company enter this market?
entries.value: Je, kampuni inapaswa kuingia katika soko hili?

entries.source: Build, critique, and learn in a shared workroom
entries.value: Jenga, kosoa, na jifunze katika chumba cha kazi cha pamoja

entries.source: Open a shared workspace with an AI collaborator. Make a rough artifact, trade edits, challenge weak spots, log decisions, and leave with concrete progress.
entries.value: Fungua nafasi ya kazi ya pamoja na mshirika wa AI. Tengeneza rasimu, badilishana marekebisho, changamoto maeneo dhaifu, rekodi maamuzi, na uondoke na maendeleo ya kweli.

entries.source: Add your next edit, decision, question, or handoff
entries.value: Ongeza marekebisho yako yanayofuata, uamuzi, swali, au makabidhiano

entries.source: Open a shared workspace with an AI collaborator. Make a rough artifact, trade edits, challenge weak spots, log decisions, and leave with concrete progress.
entries.value: Fungua nafasi ya kazi ya pamoja na mshirika wa AI. Tengeneza rasimu, badilishana marekebisho, changamoto maeneo dhaifu, rekodi maamuzi, na uondoke na maendeleo ya kweli.

entries.source: Learners exploring foundations topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wanaochunguza mada za misingi ambao wanataka mwongozo wa kivitendo badala ya kisanduku cha majibu ya jumla.

entries.source: This mode is tuned for collaborative instruction with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Hali hii imesanifiwa kwa ajili ya maelekezo ya ushirikiano ikiwa na vidokezo vyake, mifano, na mtiririko wa kujifunza.

entries.source: Build, critique, and learn in a shared workroom
entries.value: Jenga, kosoa, na jifunze katika chumba cha kazi cha pamoja

entries.source: Adapt the session to your goal
entries.value: Badilisha kipindi kulingana na lengo lako

entries.source: Build a photosynthesis explanation with me
entries.value: Jenga maelezo ya usanisinuru pamoja nami

entries.source: Adaptive lessons that make you do

Learn by doing, seeing, comparing, repairing, and proving mastery. The app builds a live lesson canvas around your goal instead of turning instruction into a long chat. Try: "Teach me financial modeling."
entries.value: Jifunze kwa kutenda, kuona, kulinganisha, kurekebisha, na kuthibitisha umahiri. Programu hujenga turubai ya somo la moja kwa moja kulingana na lengo lako badala ya kugeuza maelekezo kuwa gumzo refu. Jaribu: "Nifundishe uundaji wa kifedha."

entries.source: What would you like to learn today?
Learn by doing, comparing, repairing, and proving mastery with an AI tutor that turns your goal into an active lesson.
entries.value: Jifunze kwa kutenda, kulinganisha, kurekebisha, na kuthibitisha umahiri na mkufunzi wa AI anayegeuza lengo lako kuwa somo hai.

entries.source: Learners who want a guided lesson canvas with examples, checks, and active practice instead of a long chat answer.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wanaotaka turubai ya somo iliyoongozwa na mifano, ukaguzi, na mazoezi hai badala ya jibu la gumzo refu.

entries.source: The mode keeps the session interactive, moving between explanation, try-it steps, checks, and repairs.
entries.value: Hali hii huweka kipindi kuwa cha mwingiliano, ikihama kati ya maelezo, hatua za kujaribu, ukaguzi, na marekebisho.

entries.source: Help me learn supply and demand
entries.value: Nisaidie kujifunza kuhusu ugavi na mahitaji
Nifundishe kuhusu Nguvu Tano za Porter

entries.source: 10 MCQs on any topic with a score
entries.value: Maswali 10 ya kuchagua jibu sahihi kuhusu mada yoyote na upate alama

entries.source: Pick any topic and face a focused 10-question multiple-choice quiz. You answer one question at a time, get instant feedback, and finish with a score and review.
entries.value: Chagua mada yoyote na ukabiliane na jaribio la maswali 10 ya kuchagua jibu sahihi. Unajibu swali moja kwa wakati, unapata mrejesho wa papo hapo, na unamaliza kwa kupata alama na mapitio.

entries.source: What topic shall we put you to the test on?
entries.value: Ni mada gani ungependa tukujaribu kwayo?

entries.source: Generate a focused multiple-choice quiz on any subject and review explanations after each answer.
entries.value: Tengeneza jaribio la maswali ya kuchagua jibu sahihi kuhusu mada yoyote na upitie maelezo baada ya kila jibu.

entries.source: Learners who want active recall, quick practice, and a score they can improve.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wanaotaka kukumbuka mambo kwa bidii, mazoezi ya haraka, na alama wanazoweza kuboresha.

entries.source: The quiz mode hides answers until you respond, then turns every miss into a review point.
entries.value: Hali ya jaribio huficha majibu hadi utakapojibu, kisha hugeuza kila kosa kuwa sehemu ya mapitio.
Pasipoti ya kuingia katika ulimwengu wa kihistoria

entries.source: Receive a temporal passport, clear a travel advisory, then explore a specific historical society through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: Pokea pasipoti ya muda, kamilisha ushauri wa kusafiri, kisha chunguza jamii mahususi ya kihistoria kupitia mandhari, ramani, kalenda ya matukio, watu, sheria, orodha ya vitu, na ushahidi.

entries.source: What do you do next in this world?
entries.value: Unafanya nini baadaye katika ulimwengu huu?

entries.source: Build a temporal passport, clear the travel advisory, and explore a historical world through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: Tengeneza pasipoti ya muda, kamilisha ushauri wa kusafiri, na uchunguze ulimwengu wa kihistoria kupitia mandhari, ramani, kalenda ya matukio, watu, sheria, orodha ya vitu, na ushahidi.

entries.source: History learners who want a specific society, identity, and set of constraints rather than a generic period summary.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wa historia wanaotaka jamii mahususi, utambulisho, na seti ya vikwazo badala ya muhtasari wa jumla wa kipindi.

entries.source: The journey stays anchored in state and evidence: what is known, what is reconstructed, what is speculative, and what your identity can realistically access.
entries.value: Safari inabaki imejikita katika hali na ushahidi: kile kinachojulikana, kile kilichojengwa upya, kile kinachodhaniwa, na kile ambacho utambulisho wako unaweza kukifikia kihalisi.

entries.source: Step into conversation with a historical figure. Ask questions, challenge ideas, and hear the world through their era, values, and limits.
entries.value: Ingia katika mazungumzo na mtu mashuhuri wa kihistoria. Uliza maswali, changamoto mawazo, na usikie ulimwengu kupitia enzi, maadili, na mipaka yao.

entries.source: Which historical figure would you like to meet?
entries.value: Ni mtu gani wa kihistoria ungependa kukutana naye?

entries.source: Ask questions, challenge ideas, and learn history through grounded conversations with public figures from the past.
entries.value: Uliza maswali, changamoto mawazo, na jifunze historia kupitia mazungumzo ya kina na watu mashuhuri kutoka zamani.

entries.source: Learners who want to understand people, choices, and ideas in historical context.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wanaotaka kuelewa watu, chaguzi, na mawazo katika muktadha wa kihistoria.

entries.source: The app separates in-character conversation from short context notes about records and uncertainty.
entries.value: Programu hutenganisha mazungumzo ya wahusika na maelezo mafupi ya muktadha kuhusu rekodi na kutokuwa na uhakika.

entries.source: Name a real or fictional personality and debate them on any topic. The AI channels their public style and worldview while keeping the debate fair.
entries.value: Taja mtu halisi au wa kubuni na ubishane naye kuhusu mada yoyote. AI huiga mtindo wake wa hadharani na mtazamo wake wa ulimwengu huku ikihakikisha mjadala unakuwa wa haki.

entries.source: Who do you want to debate, and on what?
entries.value: Unataka kubishana na nani, na kuhusu nini?

entries.source: Practice argument by debating a public or fictional personality on a topic you choose.
entries.value: Jizoeze kutoa hoja kwa kubishana na mtu mashuhuri au wa kubuni kuhusu mada unayochagua.

entries.source: Learners who want lively debate practice with memorable voices and fair challenge.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wanaotaka mazoezi ya mjadala hai kwa kutumia sauti za kukumbukwa na changamoto za haki.

entries.source: The debate uses public style and worldview without pretending to know private beliefs.
entries.value: Mjadala hutumia mtindo wa hadharani na mtazamo wa ulimwengu bila kujifanya kujua imani za faragha.

entries.source: Debate climate policy with Greta Thunberg
entries.value: Bishana kuhusu sera ya hali ya hewa na Greta Thunberg
Bishana kuhusu azma na Steve Jobs

entries.source: Argue both sides and sharpen thinking
entries.value: Toa hoja pande zote mbili na uimarishe fikra zako

entries.source: Pick any topic and go head-to-head in a real debate. Choose a side, get challenged, and learn to make better arguments.
entries.value: Chagua mada yoyote na uingie kwenye mjadala wa ana kwa ana. Chagua upande, changamoto, na jifunze kutoa hoja bora zaidi.
Mada yako ya mjadala leo ni nini?

entries.source: Debate any topic, get challenged, compare claims, and learn how to make stronger arguments.
entries.value: Bishana kuhusu mada yoyote, changamoto, linganisha madai, na jifunze jinsi ya kutoa hoja zenye nguvu zaidi.

entries.source: Students, debaters, writers, and curious learners who want stronger reasoning.
entries.value: Wanafunzi, wabishaji, waandishi, na wanafunzi wadadisi wanaotaka hoja zenye nguvu zaidi.

entries.source: The coach pushes one strong counterargument at a time and tracks the claims that matter.
entries.value: Mkufunzi hutoa hoja moja yenye nguvu ya kupinga kwa wakati mmoja na kufuatilia madai muhimu.
